      public NZoned ascii()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNField
      Sets the storage method to ASCII by disabling EBCDIC storage.

      Returns:
      the current instance of AbstractNField with ASCII storage set

    • ebcdic

      public NZoned ebcdic()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNField
      Sets the EBCDIC storage flag to true, indicating that the field should use EBCDIC storage encoding.
      Overrides:
      ebcdic in class AbstractNField
      Returns:
      the current instance of AbstractNField with EBCDIC storage enabled.

      public HostVariableDataType getHostVariableType()

      Retrieves the type of the host variable associated with the context of the implementing class.

      getHostVariableType in class AbstractNField
      Returns:
      the data type of the host variable as a HostVariableDataType object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Returns a string representation of the current instance. If the instance supports decimal places, the value is formatted with the specified decimals. Otherwise, a zero-padded integer representation is returned.
      Overrides:
      toString in class AbstractNDecimal
      Returns:
      a string representation of the instance, formatted according to its properties

    • getString

      public StringValue getString()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNField
      Retrieves a string value by extracting a segment from the underlying storage and creating a new StringValue object with it.
      Overrides:
      getString in class AbstractNField
      Returns:
      the resulting StringValue object constructed from the specified storage segment.

    • isNumeric

      public boolean isNumeric()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNField
      Determines if the value represented by the current field instance is numeric. It evaluates a range of bytes in the storage to verify if they represent valid numeric characters based on the encoding defined by the `ebcdicStorage` flag.
      Overrides:
      isNumeric in class AbstractNField
      Returns:
      true if all the characters in the specified range are numeric, otherwise false.

    • setValue

      public void setValue(AbstractNNumeric f)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNNumeric
      Sets the value of the numeric field using another AbstractNNumeric.
      Overrides:
      setValue in class AbstractNNumeric
      Parameters:
      f - the AbstractNNumeric to set

    • setValue

      public void setValue(int i)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Sets the value of this instance using the specified integer value. The provided integer value is cast to a long and set using setValue(long).
      Specified by:
      setValue in interface IntegerVariable
      Overrides:
      setValue in class AbstractNDecimal
      Parameters:
      i - the integer value to set for this instance

    • setValue

      public void setValue(BigDecimal bd)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Sets the value of this instance, applying a scale transformation and rounding. The provided BigDecimal value is multiplied by the scale factor represented by pow, rounded using HALF_DOWN mode, and then converted to a long. The resulting value is written to memory.
      Overrides:
      setValue in class AbstractNDecimal
      Parameters:
      bd - the BigDecimal value to set for this instance

    • getValue

      public BigDecimal getValue()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Retrieves the value represented by this instance as a BigDecimal. The value is derived from the memory representation, and if the instance supports a specific number of decimals, the value is scaled accordingly.
      Overrides:
      getValue in class AbstractNDecimal
      Returns:
      the value of this instance as a BigDecimal, potentially scaled based on the configured decimal places

    • writeMemoryOld

      public void writeMemoryOld(long v)

    • writeMemory

      public void writeMemory(long v)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Writes a long value into the memory representation of this instance. This method is intended to be implemented by subclasses to define how the provided long value should be stored in memory.
      Specified by:
      writeMemory in class AbstractNDecimal
      Parameters:
      v - the long value to write to memory

    • readMemory

      protected long readMemory()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Reads the current value from memory. This abstract method is intended to be implemented by subclasses to provide specific logic for accessing and interpreting the memory representation.
      Specified by:
      readMemory in class AbstractNDecimal
      Returns:
      the value stored in memory as a long
